description: Phase 007 of the 008 rerank-sidecar arc. Re-evaluates whether spec-memory's SPECKIT_CROSS_ENCODER default can flip ON when Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B runs on Apple Silicon MPS instead of CPU. Phase 004 and the 2026-05-20 re-run both showed CPU's per-probe latency triggers MCP-side rerank-gate timeouts on most probes; MPS is the cheapest experiment that could clear the +500ms p95 + +3 hits + 95% sidecar-reach gates. Single-consumer bench, same 50-probe fixture, same harness as phase 004.
